body.input:
Assistant: <think>The user wants me to call generate_image with callbackMode='wakeUp' and prompt='wakeup-repeat-test'. I need to check that the initial response has a taskId and no imageUrl, then end with STEP_OK. Later when the result is injected, I need to confirm imageUrl is present and end with WAKEUP_OK.

Let me call the tool with wakeUp mode. </think>

Assistant: <think>The initial response shows taskId="local-wu-1777846323249-0f45ti" and no imageUrl. I need to end this phase with STEP_OK. Then I'll be revived when the image is ready. </think> STEP_OK

Assistant: <think>None
The deferred tool call for generate_image has completed. The result shows:
- creditCost: 3.2
- imageUrl: "http://localhost:3000/api/en-GLOBAL/agent/chat/threads/files/99dd17ef-103b-4f97-8f81-90a7ab8b709c/eac3546b-792c-4f6d-b512-f81cf7495e02.png"

The imageUrl is present and non-empty. I should end with WAKEUP_OK as instructed. </think> WAKEUP_OK

User: [T6d wakeUp-stress] Call the generate_image tool with prompt='wakeup-stress-test' and callbackMode='wakeUp'. The image will be generated asynchronously. IMPORTANT: In this first phase you should receive a taskId with no imageUrl yet - end your reply with STEP_OK if you see taskId and no imageUrl, or FAILED: <reason> otherwise. ALSO IMPORTANT: You will be automatically revived when the image is ready. When revived (you will see the generate_image tool result containing an imageUrl), confirm the imageUrl is present and non-empty, then end with WAKEUP_OK. If revived but imageUrl is missing or empty, end with WAKEUP_FAILED: <reason>.
